name: Read Only
description: View market data and reports without trading capabilities

name: Standard User
description: Full access to Bloomberg data and standard analytics

name: Power User
description: Advanced analytics, custom screens, and API access

name: Administrator
description: Full administrative control including user management

name: Finance Manager
description: Full financial management and approval authority

name: E1 License
description: Basic Office apps and email (web only)

name: E3 License
description: Full Office suite with Teams, SharePoint, and compliance

name: E5 License
description: E3 plus advanced security, compliance, and analytics

name: Viewer
description: View and interact with published dashboards

name: Creator
description: Create and publish workbooks and dashboards

name: Administrator
description: Full server administration and user management
